name: Mero Starter
description: Official landing page theme for Mero CMS. A marketing site with hero, features, testimonials, blog and team — all editable from the dashboard.
author: Blendwit Tech

defaultSettings.site_tagline: The flexible CMS for modern websites
defaultSettings.hero_title: Build Powerful Websites — Without the Complexity
defaultSettings.hero_subtitle: Mero CMS gives developers and businesses a clean content management system with a beautiful dashboard, theme switching, and a public REST API.
defaultSettings.about_content: Mero CMS is built for modern teams who need speed without sacrificing flexibility. Deploy in minutes, customize via themes, and let clients manage their own content.

pages.title: Features
pages.content:
Everything you need

Mero CMS ships with all the modules your project needs.

services.title: Theme Management
services.description: Upload ZIP themes, switch with one click, and import demo content instantly.

services.title: Blog & Content
services.description: Rich editor with categories, tags, featured images and per-post SEO meta.

services.title: Media Library
services.description: Upload, organize and reuse images and files from one clean panel.

services.title: Roles & Permissions
services.description: Invite team members and control exactly who can create, edit or delete.

services.title: SEO Tools
services.description: Meta title, description, Open Graph and canonical URL on every page and post.

services.title: Public REST API
services.description: Every piece of content exposed as clean JSON. Build any frontend with any framework.

testimonials.content: Mero CMS saved us weeks of setup. We deployed a custom theme in a day and the client loved the dashboard simplicity.
Finally a CMS where I don't need a developer to update the homepage. I do it all myself now.
We use Mero CMS for all client projects. The theme system gives each client a unique look without extra effort.
